author: Will DePue
name: Int6 + Wider MLP 3x + FP16 Embed + Sliding Window
blurb: Stacking four orthogonal improvements: int6 mixed-precision quantization on MLP+attention weights with zstd-22 compression, 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536), fp16 tied embedding passthrough, and sliding window evaluation (stride=256). Each technique contributes independently to beat the current SOTA.
